mapper.sql: r.id, r.title, r.description, r.url, r.user_id, u.name AS uploader_name, r.status, r.view_count, r.favorite_count, r.resource_type, r.resource_format, r.file_name, r.file_size, r.category_id, c.name AS category_name, CASE WHEN c3.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c3.name, ' / ', c2.name, ' / ', c.name) WHEN c2.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c2.name, ' / ', c.name) ELSE c.name END AS category_path, r.applicable_grade, r.semester, r.created_at, CASE WHEN fav2.user_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorite
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources(title, description, url, user_id, status, view_count, favorite_count, resource_type, resource_format, file_name, file_size, category_id, applicable_grade, semester, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{url}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceFormat}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{categoryId}, #{applicableGrade}, #{semester}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, category_id = #{categoryId}, applicable_grade = #{applicableGrade}, semester = #{semester}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, url, user_id, status, view_count, favorite_count, resource_type, resource_format, file_name, file_size, category_id, applicable_grade, semester, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM resources r LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c ON c.id = r.category_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c2 ON c2.id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c3 ON c3.id = c2.parent_id LEFT JOIN kg_favorites fav2 ON fav2.resource_id = r.id AND fav2.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT FROM resources r LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c ON c.id = r.category_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c2 ON c2.id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN kg_category c3 ON c3.id = c2.parent_id LEFT JOIN kg_favorites fav2 ON fav2.resource_id = r.id AND fav2.user_id = #{currentUserId}
ORDER BY r.favorite_countr.view_countr.created_at ASCDESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) FROM resources r
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kg_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{resourceId}
UPDATE resources SET favorite_count = CASE WHEN favorite_count > 0 THEN favorite_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{resourceId}
UPDATE resources SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{resourceId}
